description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian engaged in aerial silk acrobatics, suspended in mid-air by long, flowing fabric. The figure is wrapped and supported by the silk, with the body extended horizontally and the head and upper torso visible. The silk is draped and twisted, creating dynamic, ribbon-like shapes that envelop the performer and trail downward. The person's facial features and short hairstyle are clearly defined, and the clothing appears fitted and suitable for athletic or performance activities. The feet are pointed, and the legs are partially wrapped in the silk, emphasizing the acrobatic pose. The overall form is elongated and fluid, capturing the motion and grace of aerial performance.
description: An adult performing aerial silk acrobatics, suspended horizontally in flowing fabric with a dynamic, elongated pose. The figure is wrapped in silk, with visible facial features and athletic attire.
description_view_0: The front view shows the performer's face, upper torso, and the silk wrapping around the body, highlighting the acrobatic suspension.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the length and twist of the silk, with the performer's legs and feet partially visible and the fabric trailing downward.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the performer and the full extension of the silk, with the body mostly obscured by the fabric.
description_view_3: Another side view, focusing on the lower body and the way the silk supports and wraps around the legs and feet.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic performance wear with fitted top and leggings
attribute_posture: suspended horizontally in an acrobatic pose
